sections.paragraph:
Original: לטאה

Transliteration: leṭâ'âh

Phonetic: let-aw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. a kind of lizard
    1. named as being unclean
    2. perhaps an extinct animal, exact meaning is unknown

Origin: from an unused root meaning to hide

TWOT entry: 1109a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
